issues.column_or_section: KnownIssueWallet, Has Dif with TrackerBalance, Closed Country AND Regulation, User was Compensated during Country Closure, MTD Balance Change -MTD Units Total Flag
issues.problem: Flag columns with small domains have no formal key=value inline enumeration. Writer uses 'likely Y/N' in prose but doesn't formalize as dictionary entries.
Business logic rule 'MTD Units Total = MTD Units Sent + MTD Units Recieved' is presented as a rule but is pure inference from column names — no SP or data to confirm. Should be hedged.
All three sample queries target a 0-row table and are untestable. Syntactically correct but no way to verify semantic correctness.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with [x]/[ ] checkboxes. Phases only summarized as '11/14' in footer line.
Relationships to customer dimension and EXW_EOMReportingBalances are speculative — no FK constraints or SP joins to confirm. Appropriately hedged but still unverified.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor improvements only (wiki passes): (1) Add formal key=value enumerations for flag columns (KnownIssueWallet, Has Dif with TrackerBalance, Closed Country AND Regulation, User was Compensated during Country Closure). (2) Hedge business logic rules in Section 2 with 'Inferred:' prefix since no SP exists. (3) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section. (4) Note in Section 7 that queries are untestable against 0-row table.
